ddls:
CREATE TABLE "api_endpoints" (
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API endpoint */,
  "uri" TEXT /* URI of the endpoint */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the endpoint */,
  "http_method" TEXT /* HTTP method(s) allowed for the endpoint */,
  "requires_auth" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the endpoint requires authentication */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the API version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the endpoint was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "deprecated" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the endpoint is deprecated */,
  "rate_limit" TEXT /* Rate limit for the endpoint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("endpoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_endpoints_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES api_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the network */,
  "cidr" TEXT /* CIDR block of the network */,
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the endpoint used to manage this network */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the network (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the network was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_networks_endpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_id") REFERENCES api_endpoints ("endpoint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subnets" (
  "subnet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subnet */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the subnet */,
  "cidr" TEXT /* CIDR block of the subnet */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network containing this subnet */,
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the endpoint used to manage this subnet */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the subnet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subnet was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subnet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subnets_endpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_id") REFERENCES api_endpoints ("endpoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subnets_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the port */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used by the port */,
  "port_number" INTEGER /* Port number */,
  "router_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the router containing this port */,
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the endpoint used to manage this port */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the port (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the port was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ports_endpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_id") REFERENCES api_endpoints ("endpoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ports_router_id FOREIGN KEY ("router_id") REFERENCES routers ("router_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routers" (
  "router_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each router */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the router */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the router */,
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the endpoint used to manage this router */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the router */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the router was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("router_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routers_endpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_id") REFERENCES api_endpoints ("endpoint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "endpoint_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the endpoint being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the endpoint */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the endpoint was accessed */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the endpoint was accessed on this date */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Average response time for the access */,
  "error_count" INTEGER /* Number of errors encountered during access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_endpoint_usage_endpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_id") REFERENCES api_endpoints ("endpoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_endpoint_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the API */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the endpoint for this API version */,
  "deprecated" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the version is deprecated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_versions_endpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_id") REFERENCES api_endpoints ("endpoint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_authentication" (
  "auth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each authentication method */,
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the endpoint using this authentication method */,
  "auth_method" TEXT /* Name of the authentication method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the authentication method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the authentication method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("auth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_authentication_endpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_id") REFERENCES api_endpoints ("endpoint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata item */,
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the endpoint this metadata belongs to */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_metadata_endpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_id") REFERENCES api_endpoints ("endpoint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error */,
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the endpoint that can throw this error */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Error code for the error */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message for the error */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_errors_endpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_id") REFERENCES api_endpoints ("endpoint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each documentation item */,
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the endpoint this documentation belongs to */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the documentation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the documentation was last updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the documentation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_documentation_endpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_id") REFERENCES api_endpoints ("endpoint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the endpoint being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the endpoint */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Response time for the access */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the response */,
  "request_method" TEXT /* HTTP method used for the request */,
  "request_body" TEXT /* Body of the request (if applicable) */,
  "response_body" TEXT /* Body of the response (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_access_logs_endpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_id") REFERENCES api_endpoints ("endpoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
